testimonials.quote: I've been using WePlanify for a few weeks to plan a trip with friends. The interface is simple and sharing tasks is super handy.
testimonials.author: Eva

testimonials.quote: Great for tweaking stops as I travel. I can adjust my plans without redoing everything.
testimonials.author: Tom

testimonials.quote: With polls, we agreed on the hotel in 10 minutes.
testimonials.author: Lucas

testimonials.quote: We finally have a clear itinerary for the whole family.
testimonials.author: Isabelle
